'''Jord Kraas''' was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] serving as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Lieutenant Kraas and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mordaph Clafdatha]] compiled the report code-named [[Technical Specifications: Spacecraft of the Imperium and the Rebel Alliance|V492771R225Y]], detailing the capabilities and specifications of various [[Starship/Legends|starships]] used by the Empire, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and other neutral parties for [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. The report was delivered in an incomplete form, along with a plea for forgiveness regarding its state.<ref name="XWOSG" />
